title: selaginella mairei
intro: Selaginella mairei, also known as Maire's spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant species belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Selaginella mairei include its potential to reduce stress, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Selaginella mairei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
